political.s: FEC: $29K PAC donations; 41% to Republican, 59% to Democratic committees.

charity.s: $75M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.23% of revenue) via Medtronic Foundation.
charity.focus: Global health access, underserved populations, chronic disease management, community engagement, disaster relief

primaryOffenses.category: drug or medical equipment safety violation

wiki.extract: Medtronic plc is an American-Irish medical device company. The company's legal and executive headquarters are in Ireland, while its operational headquarters are in Minneapolis, Minnesota. Medtronic rebased to Ireland following its acquisition of Irish-based Covidien in 2015. While it primarily operates in the United States, it operates in more than 150 countries and employs over 90,000 people. It develops and manufactures healthcare technologies and therapies. It is one of the biggest medical tech companies in the world and is currently the largest medical device company in the world by revenu

recalls.productName: Medtronic Sphere-9 Catheter, Model Number AFR-00001; catheter, percutaneous, cardiac ablation, for treatment of atrial flutter.
recalls.reason: ventricular fibrillation (VF) during radiofrequency (RF) therapy with the Medtronic Sphere-9 catheter in patients who have a Biotronik Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD) or Biotronik Cardiac Resynchronization Therapy-Defibrillator (CRT-D) implanted. The observation is caused by an interaction between the Sphere-9 catheter current flow and a safety feature built into Biotronik ICDs and CRT Ds.  Medtronic recommends physicians use increased caution when using the Sphere-9 catheter for RF ablation therapy in patients implanted with a Biotronik ICD/CRT-D system, and to ensure external defibrillation systems are readily available.

recalls.productName: Abre Venous Self-Expanding Stent System, Model numbers AB9G14120090  AB9G12100090  AB9G14080090  AB9G12080090  AB9U12060090  AB9U14100090  AB9U14080090  AB9U12080090  AB9U14060090  AB9G14100090  AB9G12060090
recalls.reason: Stents may be impacted by a Nitinol anomaly which causes a reduced stent diameter when deployed and corresponding reduced radial force. Issue may result in stent migration.

recalls.productName: Aurora EV-ICD and Clinical EV-ICD, single chamber, extravascular implantable cardioverter defibrillators (ICD), Product Number DVEA3E4
recalls.reason: There is a potential for delayed time to high-voltage (HV) therapy should a rare sequence of events occur.

recalls.productName: Medtronic CareLink SmartSync Patient Connector, Model Number 24967 with the following software components:    1.	Cobalt Crome application, Software Model Number D00U005;    2.	Claria Amplia Compia application, Software Model Number D00U009;    3.	Evera MRI application, Software Model Number D00U010;    3.	Visia AF application, Software Model Number D00U011;    5.	Viva Brava Evera application, Software Model Number D00U012;
recalls.reason: In prior SmartSync application versions, the Abort button stopped the test that was selected. During an induction test, there was a limited window of time for the user to abort a therapy, thereby limiting the user's ability to cancel a high voltage therapy delivery.

recalls.productName: Medtronic CareLink SmartSync Device Manager, Model Number 24967A with the following software components:    1.	Cobalt Crome application, Software Model Number D00U005;    2.	Claria Amplia Compia application, Software Model Number D00U009;    3.	Evera MRI application, Software Model Number D00U010;    3.	Visia AF application, Software Model Number D00U011;    5.	Viva Brava Evera application, Software Model Number D00U012;
recalls.reason: In prior SmartSync application versions, the Abort button stopped the test that was selected. During an induction test, there was a limited window of time for the user to abort a therapy, thereby limiting the user's ability to cancel a high voltage therapy delivery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: The employee sprayed her hands with isopropyl alcohol (IPA) disinfectant. While using the alcohol and rubbing her hands, droplets of IPA fell to the floor. When the employee turned to walk away, her right foot slipped on the IPA droplets and she fell to the floor, landing on her right side and fracturing her right hip. The employee was hospitalized.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by object or equipment, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was unpacking testing equipment. While releasing the bungee hooks, the first cord slipped out of their hand and a metal s-hook hit their left eye.
An employee attending an operating room event experienced low blood pressure and collapsed, striking his head when he fell. He was hospitalized with a skull fracture.

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Chest, except internal location of diseases or disorders
sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was climbing a ladder to access and repair a piece of air compressor equipment when the ladder kicked off and came in contact with the structural surface. The employee suffered three non-displaced rib fractures and contusions.
